title: Luffy Strikes Back
description: Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper strike back after Usopp is beaten, turning the search for the stolen money into revenge.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper strike back after Usopp is beaten, turning the search for the stolen money into revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Escape thru the GH back door!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: All you want is the money. Right?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No matter how much havoc you wreak...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's right. You ticked us off.

dialogue.speaker: Franky Family
dialogue.text: Eat this!! The Frankys' Special Attack:

summary: Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper strike back after Usopp is beaten, turning the search for the stolen money into revenge.
